name: codex-auto-router
description: Automatically decomposes Codex tasks and routes bounded work from a Sol or Terra parent to Terra or Luna subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically assign Terra and Luna subagents
interface.longDescription: Mention Auto Router and describe only the outcome. The active Sol or Terra parent decides the decomposition, child models, roles, parallelism, validation, and final integration.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository thoroughly and prioritize evidence-backed issue candidates. Do not change files.
Investigate and fix this bug, then run the relevant checks.
Review this branch against the base branch and report only material findings.
